titleStmt.title: SII 6.1101: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1101. (A.R. No. 343-J of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Avyāt karīṁdraripubhūdha(da)ranāyakassa śrīpallavā
khyakulajātamahīpavaryaṁ . sauUbhāgyadēvamaniṣaṁ (.) śatataṁ nṛsiṁhya
putraṁ kalatrasahitaṁ dvijapārijātaṁ . śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1342 gunēṁ
ṭi jyēṣṭha sukla 10 mi bhudavarānama vīragōṭapu puruṣōttamarājula koḍku bhā
radvājagōtruṁḍaina saubhāgyadēvarājulu tamaku śukṛtaṁgānu śrīnara
siṁhyanātuniki nityaṁnu sama¨rppiṁcena Amudupaḍi bīyamu tu 4 kai pe
ṭina treṁgāḍaceṟuvu venaka jalakṣētraṁ puṭlu reṁḍu 2 I Āraṁgiṁpanu veṁ
ḍi talya 1 la Etu visya 1 pala 18 veṁḍi taṁba pala 9 I mādēvi veṁḍi ku
ḍukalu 2 la pala 6 taṁbaga¨ryya 2 la visya 4 pala 14 I Āragiṁpina prasādaṁ bu
jiṁci Ubhayadupala koluvaṁgalaru siṁginatagōpunāyaṁḍu goḍa 1 maṁcinē
nidāsi goḍa 1 nuṁkalasiṁgunaṁbyaḷu goḍu 1 Avyanaṁbaḷanarisana goḍa 1 siyama
hasēnapati divyako 1 naraśiAppaya divyakō 1 peraṇi narisināyaḍu Alāvaṭaṁ 1 vallabhana
ṁbhyaḷasiṁgara Arigirini Ālavaṭa 1 padmanidi veṁḍi ṭaṁkalu 20 la kolupulu 4 ṁṭi dōssāsi ta
na garāyanibaṁdha 1 mēgapu A¨rccanagaraya nibaṁdha 1 puruṣasūtramu siṁgināyaka tamināya
ḍu ku 1 kaṁcinaḍu ku 1 ga paṁḍreṁḍu kolupulu Asaṁdrā¨rkkastāIgā koluvaṁgalāru
I komarika sauUramma da(ṁ)ttaṁ
pratidivasamu sannidhi velugu
ṭaku Akhaṁḍadīpa 1 neI nelaku
pu 7 . gōIṁdunāIni koḍku Anna
magōcranā peṭina mōdālu 50 Itaniki
kuḍujītānaku peṭina treṁgāḍa ja
lakṣētra pu(ṁ)ṭaḍu 1 dīpadaṁḍya 1 A
[E]ttu visya I dīpa Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkastāIgānu peṭaṁgalāṁḍu I
dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrī
śrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
